Withdrawals - NBG - Whitelisting
As an agent, I want to access a history of all bulk whitelisting runs, so that I can review past actions for accountability
As an agent, I want to see confirmation that my whitelisting request was accepted by NBG, so that I know the action succeeded
As an agent, I want to manually enter the OTP code I receive on my phone, so that I can securely confirm the whitelisting action
As an agent, I want to see a clear state change after initiating the process, so that I know the system is waiting for my OTP confirmation
As an agent, I want to send all IBANs at once (up to 1000 maximum), so that I can efficiently process large batches
As an agent, I want to see the total number of IBANs eligible for whitelisting, so that I understand the scope before taking action
